creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #26)

Why? Ports just perfectly work? I you can leave out what you don't need. Yet another problem I cannot solve with poudriere: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/883 and https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/881. For now, it is too much effort to produce a superset of all ports on all hosts I use for now.
